title: Classic 3D Fixed
description: Classic 3D Fixed to compatibility in recent versions
body:
Classic 3D Fixed to compatibility in 1.21.10

**Legacy Project: [github.com](https://github.com/the-pink-hacker/classic-3d-redux)**

No blocks have been modified, added, or removed; they have only been corrected for proper integration into recent versions of the game, as the original project has not been updated.  Enjoy it in the latest versions :).
